childhood.familyBackground: Von Holtzbrinck was born into the prominent von Holtzbrinck publishing family. His family built a major media and publishing empire in Germany.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 폰 홀츠브링크는 저명한 폰 홀츠브링크 출판 가족에 태어났다.
childhood.earlyLife: Von Holtzbrinck worked in the family publishing business and helped expand operations into global media markets. He modernized the company during the digital transition.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 폰 홀츠브링크는 가족 출판 사업에서 일했고 글로벌 미디어 시장으로 운영 확장을 도왔다.

careerTimeline.event: Joined family publishing business and took leadership role
careerTimeline.eventKo: 가족 출판 사업에 참여하고 리더십 역할 담당

careerTimeline.event: Expanded publishing operations into digital media and online platforms
careerTimeline.eventKo: 출판 운영을 디지털 미디어 및 온라인 플랫폼으로 확장

careerTimeline.event: Maintained billionaire status through diversified media holdings
careerTimeline.eventKo: 다양한 미디어 지주를 통해 억만장자 지위 유지

failures.description: Traditional publishing division faced challenges from digital transformation and changing consumer habits
failures.descriptionKo: 전통 출판 부문이 디지털 변환 및 소비자 습관 변화로 인한 도전에 직면
failures.lesson: Media companies must adapt quickly to technological disruption
failures.lessonKo: 미디어 회사는 기술적 혼란에 빠르게 적응해야 한다

quotes.text: Publishing and media must evolve to meet changing audience expectations
quotes.textKo: 출판 및 미디어는 변화하는 청중 기대를 충족하기 위해 진화해야 한다

recommended.title: The Future of the Internet
recommended.author: Various
recommended.note: Informed his strategy for digital media transformation

personalTraits.knownFor: German publishing family leadership; media industry expertise; digital transformation
personalTraits.knownForKo: 독일 출판 가족 리더십; 미디어 산업 전문성; 디지털 변환
personalTraits.philanthropy: Supports cultural institutions and publishing education in Germany
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 독일의 문화 기관 및 출판 교육 지원
